caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with the white text "ION NEVER DO SHIT" is speaking into a professional microphone in a room filled with framed photos and clothing racks. A white mannequin wearing a white shirt stands in the background. On the left side of the screen, a circular logo contains the text "THE BIG SHIT," and on the right, red text reads "BOARDLY FLY TOT." As the sequence progresses, the man gestures with his right hand, starting with his palm open and fingers spread, then slowly bringing his hand down toward his chest. His facial expression shifts from an active speaking pose with an open mouth to a more closed-mouth, contemplative expression. The camera angle remains static throughout the sequence, focusing on the man from the chest up.
